title: heliosperma alpestre
intro: Heliosperma alpestre, also known as edelweiss, is a perennial alpine plant that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Heliosperma alpestre include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Heliosperma alpestre include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin issues.
